title: polygala arillata var. revoluta
intro: Polygala arillata var. revoluta, also known as the common polygala or polygala, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of polygala arillata var. revoluta include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of polygala arillata var. revoluta typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and roots to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
